title: Dino Nuggie Totem of Undying
description: Brontosaurus Dino Nuggie Totem of Undying
body:
This Resource Pack was inspired by a good friend of mine who is obsessed with Dino Nuggies. Specifically the Brontosaurus shape which has been nicknamed "Jupiter" in her own headcanon.

The Resource Pack also changes the Item Name to "Jupiter's Blessing" and adds some fun to the other references to the Totem of Undying in game.
